page.content: In the Asia-Pacific professional report covering AbbVie’s real-world evidence studies, we observe a variety of Clinical Trials across years 2020, 2021, and 2022. The Efficacy Study in 2020 recorded 150 cases with 5% observational studies costing CNY10M, yielding positive outcomes for DrugA and was completed. In 2021, the Efficacy Study increased to 200 cases with 7% observational studies at a cost of CNY15M, also positive for DrugB, and completed. The Safety Study in 2020 had 100 cases with 3% observational studies costing CNY5M, resulting in neutral outcomes for DrugC and was ongoing. In 2021, the Safety Study recorded 120 cases with 4% observational studies costing CNY7M, achieving positive outcomes for DrugD, and was completed. The Cost-Effectiveness Study in 2020 involved 90 cases with 2% observational studies costing CNY4M, which was negative for DrugE and completed, while in 2021, it had 110 cases with 3% observational studies costing CNY6M, remaining neutral for DrugF and ongoing.

across years 2020, 2021, and 2022. The Efficacy Study in 2020 recorded 150 cases with 5% observational studies costing
CNY10M, yielding positive outcomes for DrugA and was completed. In 2021, the Efficacy Study increased to 200 cases with
7% observational studies at a cost of CNY15M, also positive for DrugB, and completed. The Safety Study in 2020 had 100
cases with 3% observational studies costing CNY5M, resulting in neutral outcomes for DrugC and was ongoing. In 2021, the
Safety Study recorded 120 cases with 4% observational studies costing CNY7M, achieving positive outcomes for DrugD, and
was completed. The Cost-Effectiveness Study in 2020 involved 90 cases with 2% observational studies costing CNY4M, which
was negative for DrugE and completed, while in 2021, it had 110 cases with 3% observational studies costing CNY6M,
remaining neutral for DrugF and ongoing.

page.content: The Patient Registry in 2020 accounted for 80 cases with 1% observational studies costing CNY2M, positive for DrugG and completed. From the revenue perspective, Immunology recorded total revenue of CNY25B with a market share of 10% in 2020, growing to CNY30B with 12% market share in 2021, and reaching CNY35B in 2022.

lines.text: The Patient Registry in 2020 accounted for 80 cases with 1% observational studies costing CNY2M, positive for DrugG and
completed. From the revenue perspective, Immunology recorded total revenue of CNY25B with a market share of 10% in 2020,
growing to CNY30B with 12% market share in 2021, and reaching CNY35B in 2022.

page.content: Oncology generated CNY15B in 2020, increasing to CNY18B in 2021 with a 5% YoY change, and further to CNY20B in 2022 with a 7% YoY change. Further, the therapeutic area saw a 15% market share in 2020, 3% YoY change to 2021, and a 5% increase to 2022.
